rationale: Gov't Code §2001.086 governs admissibility of documentary evidence in contested administrative cases. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts; no conflict exists.
quote: A copy or excerpt of documentary evidence may be received in a contested case if an original document is not readily available.
_note: Rule concerns administrative hearing evidence procedure, not property tax exemptions. No conflict with proposed change.
